contract_source.expected_solution: Agent identifies FastAPI request validation logic The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: routing.py and utils.py). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: routing, pydantic, validation, body, dependency, deserializ.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (routing.py and utils.py) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: routing, pydantic, validation, body, and dependency
Captures at least one of the canonical drift findings: FastAPI Pydantic v2 validation expects explicit None vs missing key distinction that httpx JSON serialization does not preserve
